name: Score 18 Indoor Golf
address: 501 S Weber Rd Unit 109, Bolingbrook, IL 60490
about: Score 18 Indoor Golf is a cutting-edge training center and entertainment venue focused on providing serious golfers with advanced technology and immersive experiences. The facility uses advanced simulators to deliver 4K realism across 150,000+ global courses, measuring exact distance, trajectory, and launch speed for each shot. Pricing is straightforward, with bay-based hourly rates and a variety of packages available, making it suitable for both individual practice and group events. The venue offers a welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners looking to learn to serious players refining their technique.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 150,000+ global courses in 4K realism
Precision analytics and real-time ball flight tracking
Video review technology for club head analysis
Professional golf lessons available for one-on-one coaching
Convenient location with easy booking process

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food options available, including pizza. No outside food permitted without authorization.
No alcohol mentioned as available on-site; BYOB not permitted unless authorized by Score 18.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. The venue does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not permitted unless authorized by Score 18. On-site food options are available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A 1-hour bay reservation is approximately 18 holes for 1 player. Half-hour reservations cover about 9 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and open to all ages, including juniors and youth golfers.
